'''Dara Gunto''' was a [[near-Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She worked as a performer at [[The Chasm]], located in [[Gadrin]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]], during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. Her gig at the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] was not voluntary, however, as she had spilled a drink on the [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] shortly before, and was working as a singer to pay off her debt.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Forces of Cularin: Force Contention}} {{1st}}
